hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称停战已“维持生命”，长期能源危机迫在眉睫；【CRYPTO】从黑客攻击到 OP Stack：Lazarus 攻击四年后，Ronin 从游戏侧链迁移到以太坊第 2 层；【FINANCE】Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Long-Term Energy Crisis Looms as Trump Says Truce Is on ‘Life Support’
items.summary: Iran defended its demands for a peace deal and President Trump called them “garbage.” Mr. Trump said he wanted to suspend the federal gasoline tax, which would require congressional approval.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称停战已“维持生命”，长期能源危机迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 伊朗为其和平协议的要求辩护，特朗普总统称其为“垃圾”。特朗普表示，他希望暂停征收联邦汽油税，这需要国会批准。

items.title: From hack to OP Stack: Ronin to migrate from gaming sidechain to Ethereum Layer 2 four years after Lazarus attack
items.summary: Ronin migrates from an Ethereum sidechain to an OP Stack Layer 2 on May 12, four years after Lazarus hackers stole over $600M in crypto.
items.title_zh: 从黑客攻击到 OP Stack：Lazarus 攻击四年后，Ronin 从游戏侧链迁移到以太坊第 2 层
items.summary_zh: Ronin 于 5 月 12 日从以太坊侧链迁移到 OP Stack Layer 2，四年前，Lazarus 黑客窃取了超过 6 亿美元的加密货币。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: Banking groups escalate fight over stablecoin yield ahead of Senate vote
items.summary: The American Bankers Association amplified warnings the Senate’s Clarity Act could push deposit flight into stablecoins unless lawmakers tighten yield limits.
items.title_zh: 在参议院投票之前，银行集团对稳定币收益率的争论升级
items.summary_zh: 美国银行家协会进一步警告，除非立法者收紧收益率限制，否则参议院的《澄清法案》可能会推动存款流向稳定币。

items.title: American Bankers Association CEO makes final-hour push for tightened limits on stablecoin rewards ahead of Senate committee vote
items.summary: Days before a key Senate committee to vote on crypto legislation, ABA CEO Rob Nichols sent a letter to bank executives.
items.title_zh: 美国银行家协会首席执行官在参议院委员会投票前的最后时刻推动收紧稳定币奖励的限制
items.summary_zh: 在参议院重要委员会就加密立法进行投票的前几天，ABA 首席执行官 Rob Nichols 致信银行高管。

items.title: Why the TradFi takeover of crypto might not be the death blow analysts expect
items.summary: Gate’s CBO argues that Bloomberg’s warning of a TradFi takeover is "oversimplified," noting that global exchanges evolved past fee-only models years ago.
items.title_zh: 为什么 TradFi 对加密货币的收购可能不会成为分析师预期的致命一击
items.summary_zh: Gate 的 CBO 认为，彭博社对 TradFi 收购的警告“过于简单化”，并指出全球交易所多年前就已经超越了仅收费模式。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI surges 25% over weekend
items.summary: Cronos (CRO), up 9.7% from Friday, joined Sui (SUI) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 性能更新：SUI 周末飙升 25%
items.summary_zh: Cronos (CRO) 较上周五上涨 9.7%，与 Sui (SUI) 一起成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: Strategy buys 535 bitcoin for $43 million days after signaling potential BTC sales
items.summary: Last week's purchases were funded by sales of the company's common stock.
items.title_zh: 在发出潜在的 BTC 销售信号后，Strategy 以 4300 万美元的价格购买了 535 个比特币
items.summary_zh: 上周的购买资金来自于该公司普通股的销售。

items.title: MoonPay launching AI agent tool for prediction market trading after acquiring Dawn Labs
items.summary: The new AI-powered tool is designed to help "non-technical users" craft prediction market trading strategies.
items.title_zh: MoonPay收购Dawn Labs后推出预测市场交易的AI代理工具
items.summary_zh: 新的人工智能驱动工具旨在帮助“非技术用户”制定预测市场交易策略。

items.title: ‘Groundbreaking’ prediction market ETFs launch delayed again as SEC reviews more: analyst
items.summary: ETFs would offer investors a way to wager on the outcome of elections and economic events using the publicly-traded financial instruments.
items.title_zh: 随着 SEC 审查更多，“突破性”预测市场 ETF 推出再次推迟：分析师
items.summary_zh: ETF 将为投资者提供一种利用公开交易的金融工具对选举和经济事件的结果进行押注的方式。

items.title: ‘Back to work’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys 535 bitcoin for $43 million after brief pause as total holdings hit 818,869 BTC
items.summary: Strategy's total holdings now account for more than 3.9% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $66.5 billion.
items.title_zh: “重返工作岗位”：Michael Saylor 的策略在短暂暂停后以 4300 万美元购买了 535 枚比特币，总持有量达到 818,869 BTC
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的总持有量目前占 2100 万枚比特币供应上限的 3.9% 以上，价值约 665 亿美元。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.summary_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's descendants
items.summary: The painting is believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two.
items.title_zh: 在荷兰党卫军领导人后裔家中发现纳粹掠夺的肖像
items.summary_zh: 据信，这幅画是在第二次世界大战期间被纳粹高级领导人赫尔曼·戈林掠夺的。

items.title: Whales could be harmed by diverted ships avoiding Middle East, scientists warn
items.summary: Ships have rerouted around the Cape of Good Hope since 2023 to avoid conflicts in the Middle East.
items.title_zh: 科学家警告说，避开中东的船只可能会伤害鲸鱼
items.summary_zh: 自 2023 年以来，船只绕行好望角，以避免中东冲突。

items.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
items.summary: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗对美国结束战争提议的反应“完全不可接受”
items.summary_zh: 据报道，伊朗希望解除美国的海上封锁，承认伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的主权，并赔偿战争损失。

items.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body
items.summary: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.
items.title_zh: 他的父亲刚刚下葬。然后西岸定居者强迫他挖出尸体
items.summary_zh: 联合国人权办公室谴责约旦河西岸发生的这一事件“令人震惊，是巴勒斯坦人非人化的象征”。

items.title: Modi Urges Indians to Buy Less Gold and Skip Foreign Trips as Iran War Strains Economy
items.summary: Under pressure from the economic fallout of the war in Iran and politically emboldened, Prime Minister Narendra Modi asks Indians to sacrifice.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争给经济带来压力，莫迪敦促印度人减少购买黄金并避免出国旅行
items.summary_zh: 迫于伊朗战争经济影响和政治上的勇气，总理纳伦德拉·莫迪要求印度人做出牺牲。

items.title: Corpay taps BVNK to bring stablecoin wallets to corporate payments
items.summary: Corpay will use stablecoin rails in its treasury operations to improve capital efficiency, reduce reliance on pre-funded accounts, and move funds across its global footprint.
items.title_zh: Corpay 利用 BVNK 将稳定币钱包引入企业支付
items.summary_zh: Corpay 将在其资金运营中使用稳定币轨道，以提高资本效率，减少对预先融资账户的依赖，并在其全球足迹中转移资金。

items.title: Galaxy-backed Boundary to launch ‘verifiable’ institutional stablecoin USBD
items.summary: The project has raised $2 million in pre-seed funding led by Galaxy Ventures and plans to launch USBD on Ethereum in early summer 2026.
items.title_zh: Galaxy 支持的 Boundary 将推出“可验证”机构稳定币 USBD
items.summary_zh: 该项目已筹集了由 Galaxy Ventures 领投的 200 万美元种子前资金，并计划于 2026 年初夏在以太坊上推出 USBD。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Osmosis (OSMO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #414.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Osmosis (OSMO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#414。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bertram The Pomeranian (BERT)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #915.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bertram The Pomeranian (BERT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#915。

items.title: Trending Crypto: wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #596.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#596。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #91.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 91。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #85.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 85。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
items.summary: Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.
items.title_zh: Simplex 使用 Codex 重新思考软件开发
items.summary_zh: Simplex 通过 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 促进软件开发，减少设计、构建和测试时间，同时扩展人工智能驱动的工作流程。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: The biggest consensus overhaul in Solana history is officially live for testing
items.summary: The upgrade, known as Alpenglow, is live on a community test cluster, said Solana core developer Anza.
items.title_zh: Solana 历史上最大的共识改革正式上线进行测试
items.summary_zh: Solana 核心开发人员 Anza 表示，此次升级称为 Alpenglow，已在社区测试集群上上线。

items.title: Ronin set to transition to Ethereum layer 2 from independent sidechain
items.summary: The purpose behind the migration is to enhance security, tokenomics and scalability, said Ronin, which suffered the largest DeFi bridge exploit on record in 2022.
items.title_zh: Ronin 将从独立侧链过渡到以太坊第 2 层
items.summary_zh: Ronin 表示，迁移背后的目的是增强安全性、代币经济和可扩展性，该公司在 2022 年遭受了有记录以来最大规模的 DeFi 桥漏洞攻击。

items.title: Sharplink Q1 revenue tops $12 million as it pursues ‘singles and doubles’ hits in ETH yield
items.summary: Sharplink said its new Galaxy Digital partnership will deploy roughly $125 million into onchain liquidity and DeFi opportunities.
items.title_zh: Sharplink 第一季度收入突破 1200 万美元，因为它追求 ETH 收益率的“单倍和双倍”目标
items.summary_zh: Sharplink 表示，其新的 Galaxy Digital 合作伙伴关系将部署约 1.25 亿美元用于链上流动性和 DeFi 机会。

items.title: ‘Crypto at the crossroads’: Analysts say Iran tensions and whale selling cloud outlook as bitcoin holds above $81K
items.summary: Bitcoin holds above $81K as Iran rejects US peace terms, Brent tops $104, and a $1B whale's ETH selling clouds an otherwise bullish backdrop.
items.title_zh: “加密货币正处于十字路口”：分析师表示，伊朗紧张局势和鲸鱼抛售前景阴云，比特币维持在 8.1 万美元以上
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗拒绝美国的和平条款，比特币价格维持在 8.1 万美元以上，布伦特原油价格突破 104 美元，而 10 亿美元鲸鱼的 ETH 抛售则给原本看涨的背景蒙上了一层阴影。

items.title: OpenAI launches DeployCo to help businesses build around intelligence
items.summary: OpenAI launches DeployCo, a new enterprise deployment company built to help organizations bring frontier AI into production and turn it into measurable business impact.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 DeployCo，帮助企业围绕智能进行构建
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 DeployCo，这是一家新的企业部署公司，旨在帮助组织将前沿人工智能投入生产并将其转化为可衡量的业务影响。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
items.title_zh: Parloa 建立客户想要交谈的服务代理
items.summary_zh: Parloa 利用 OpenAI 模型为可扩展、语音驱动的 AI 客户服务代理提供支持，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。

items.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
items.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
items.title_zh: 利用 API 中的新模型推进语音智能
items.summary_zh: 探索 OpenAI API 中新的实时语音模型，该模型可以推理、翻译和转录语音，从而实现更自然、更智能的语音体验。

items.title: The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe.
items.summary: This week, the new, AI-powered Google Finance is launching across Europe, with full local language support. This reimagined experience offers a suite of powerful capabil…
items.title_zh: 新的人工智能驱动的谷歌财经正在扩展到欧洲。
items.summary_zh: 本周，由人工智能驱动的全新 Google 财经将在欧洲推出，并提供全面的本地语言支持。这种重新构想的体验提供了一系列强大的功能……

items.title: See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses.
items.summary: Today we're launching The Small Brief, an initiative bringing together three ad industry icons to champion a local businesses they love. Their mission is to build breakt…
items.title_zh: 看看当创意传奇人物使用人工智能为小型企业制作广告时会发生什么。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们推出 The Small Brief，该计划汇集了广告行业的三位偶像，以支持他们喜爱的当地企业。他们的使命是建立突破......

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Series of court decisions weaken Democrats' odds of winning the House
items.summary: A U.S. Supreme Court decision and ruling from the Virginia Supreme Court have altered the redistricting outlook, hurting the chance that House control will flip.
items.title_zh: 一系列法院判决削弱了民主党赢得众议院的可能性
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院的一项决定和弗吉尼亚州最高法院的裁决改变了选区重新划分的前景，损害了众议院控制权翻转的机会。

items.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
items.summary: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 不相信：“对于任何呈抛物线走势的股票，头寸几乎都会减少”
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，投资者应该“拒绝贪婪”，因为对人工智能和动力驱动交易的热情推动估值大幅上涨。

items.title: How much further does this Teflon market have to go? Here's what traders say
items.summary: Traders on prediction markets platform Kalshi place a more than 50% chance that the S&P 500 crosses 8,000 in 2026.
items.title_zh: 特氟龙市场还有多远的路要走？这是贸易商的说法
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，标普 500 指数在 2026 年突破 8,000 点的可能性超过 50%。

items.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
items.summary: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，今天的市场感觉就像“1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月”
items.summary_zh: “股市上涨或下跌并不是因为就业或消费者信心，”伯里写道。 “感觉就像 1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月。”

items.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after leaving ship
items.summary: The American national has arrived in Nebraska, while a French woman is isolating in Paris.
items.title_zh: 美国和法国国民下船后汉坦病毒检测呈阳性
items.summary_zh: 这名美国公民已抵达内布拉斯加州，而一名法国女性正在巴黎接受隔离。

items.title: Washington dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty
items.summary: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, was charged with attempting to assassinate US President Donald Trump.
items.title_zh: 华盛顿晚宴枪击案嫌疑人不认罪
items.summary_zh: 31 岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦 (Cole Tomas Allen) 被指控试图刺杀美国总统唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump)。

items.title: Dozens of Nigerian fishermen feared dead after Chad air strikes on Boko Haram
items.summary: A fishermen's leader tells the BBC that 40 people are feared dead - either in the strikes or drowning as they tried to flee.
items.title_zh: 乍得空袭博科圣地后数十名尼日利亚渔民可能死亡
items.summary_zh: 一名渔民领袖告诉 BBC，担心有 40 人死亡——要么是在罢工中，要么是在试图逃跑时溺水身亡。

items.title: Philippine VP Sara Duterte impeached for a second time
items.summary: If convicted in a Senate trial, which is uncertain, she will be disqualified from running for president.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾副总统萨拉·杜特尔特第二次被弹劾
items.summary_zh: 如果在参议院审判中被定罪（尚不确定），她将被取消竞选总统的资格。

items.title: Bosnia's powerful peace envoy quits, with questions over role's future
items.summary: Christian Schmidt had been in the role since 2021, and departs after appearing to lose the backing of the United States.
items.title_zh: 波斯尼亚强大的和平特使辞职，其角色的未来受到质疑
items.summary_zh: 克里斯蒂安·施密特 (Christian Schmidt) 自 2021 年起担任该职务，在似乎失去美国的支持后离职。

items.title: Ailing Iranian Nobel laureate given bail and hospital transfer
items.summary: Iranian authorities granted human rights activist Narges Mohammadi bail amid growing concern over her poor health in prison.
items.title_zh: 生病的伊朗诺贝尔奖得主获得保释并转院
items.summary_zh: 由于人们越来越担心人权活动人士纳尔吉斯·穆罕默迪 (Narges Mohammadi) 在监狱中的健康状况不佳，伊朗当局批准了她的保释。

items.title: What Middle Powers Fear from the Trump-Xi Summit
items.summary: Asian nations worry that the president might trade security commitments for better economic terms with China during his planned meeting with Xi Jinping this week.
items.title_zh: 中等强国对特习会有何恐惧
items.summary_zh: 亚洲国家担心，总统可能会在本周与习近平的会晤中牺牲安全承诺，以换取与中国更好的经济条件。

items.title: Starmer Says Defeat Hurt but Promises He’ll Fight to Stay On
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer of Britain managed to quell an immediate mutiny in his Labour Party after last week’s election results. But for how long?
items.title_zh: 斯塔默表示失败很受伤，但承诺他会继续努力
items.summary_zh: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默在上周的选举结果公布后立即成功平息了工党内的叛变。但持续多久呢？

items.title: How Israel Turned Eurovision’s Stage Into a Soft Power Tool
items.summary: Israel’s efforts to influence Eurovision’s vote were broader and started years earlier than previously known.
items.title_zh: 以色列如何将欧洲歌唱大赛的舞台变成软实力工具
items.summary_zh: 以色列影响欧洲电视网投票的努力范围更广，而且比之前所知的早几年就开始了。

items.title: Ukraine Looks to Step Away From Trump and U.S.
items.summary: With peace talks on ice and Ukraine now more self-reliant, President Volodymyr Zelensky seems to be stepping away from the United States.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰希望远离特朗普和美国
items.summary_zh: 随着和平谈判陷入僵局，乌克兰现在更加自力更生，总统弗拉基米尔·泽伦斯基似乎正在远离美国。

items.title: European Union Hits Israeli Settlers With Sanctions
items.summary: Israel criticized the European Union’s announcement that it will apply sanctions to Israeli settlers over violence against Palestinians.
items.title_zh: 欧盟对以色列定居者实施制裁
items.summary_zh: 以色列批评欧盟宣布将对以色列定居者实施针对巴勒斯坦人的暴力行为实施制裁。

items.title: The Fight to Euthanize Pablo Escobar’s Hippos in Colombia
items.summary: Colombia is planning to cull a population of wild hippos, the offspring of the drug lord’s pets, dividing a town where hippos are the main draw.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚对巴勃罗·埃斯科瓦尔的河马实施安乐死的斗争
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚正计划扑杀一群野生河马，这些野生河马是毒枭的宠物的后代，从而分裂了一个以河马为主要吸引力的城镇。

items.title: Thailand’s Thaksin Shinawatra Is Out of Prison. What Will He Do Now?
items.summary: Mr. Thaksin has long been a foil to Thailand’s conservative establishment. He still holds significant influence, with his political party a member of the governing coalition.
items.title_zh: 泰国他信·西那瓦出狱。他现在会做什么？
items.summary_zh: 他信长期以来一直是泰国保守派的陪衬。他仍然拥有重大影响力，他的政党是执政联盟的成员。

items.title: How to Win Eurovision With Just a Few Hundred Voters
items.summary: Exclusive voting data shows that, despite Eurovision’s assurances, an Israeli campaign could easily have influenced last year’s contest.
items.title_zh: 如何以几百名选民赢得欧洲歌唱大赛
items.summary_zh: 独家投票数据显示，尽管欧洲歌唱大赛做出了保证，但以色列的竞选活动很容易影响去年的比赛。

items.summary_zh: Anchorage Digital 联合创始人兼首席执行官 Nathan McCauley 表示，他的公司将在稳定币方面“增强中立性”。

items.title: Ripple raises $200 million from Neuberger Berman to expand its Ripple Prime platform
items.summary: Ripple announced its agreement with the global investment firm Monday, noting that Ripple Prime’s revenue has tripled in the last year, when. it acquired it for $1.25 billion.
items.title_zh: Ripple 从 Neuberger Berman 筹集了 2 亿美元，用于扩展其 Ripple Prime 平台
items.summary_zh: Ripple 周一宣布与这家全球投资公司达成协议，并指出 Ripple Prime 的收入去年增加了两倍。它以 12.5 亿美元收购了它。

items.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slows down ether purchases after already buying 1 million tokens this year
items.summary: The firm bought roughly 26,000 ether last week, a sharp decline from the average of the previous weeks' 100,000.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 在今年已经购买了 100 万枚代币后，放慢了购买以太币的速度
items.summary_zh: 该公司上周购买了大约 26,000 枚以太币，较前几周的平均 100,000 枚大幅下降。

items.title: ‘Crypto spring has commenced,’ Tom Lee says as Bitmine’s weekly accumulation slows below 100,000 ETH pace
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion bought another 26,659 ETH ($62 million) last week and now holds more than 5.2 million ETH in total.
items.title_zh: 随着 Bitmine 每周积累速度放缓至 100,000 ETH 以下，Tom Lee 说道：“加密货币的春天已经开始”
items.summary_zh: Bitmine Immersion 上周又购买了 26,659 枚 ETH（6200 万美元），目前总共持有超过 520 万枚 ETH。

items.title: Neuberger backs Ripple Prime with $200 million debt line for margin lending expansion: Bloomberg
items.summary: Ripple Prime secured a $200 million Neuberger Berman facility to expand margin lending across equities, fixed income and crypto.
items.title_zh: Neuberger 以 2 亿美元债务额度支持 Ripple Prime 以扩大保证金贷款：彭博社
items.summary_zh: Ripple Prime 获得了 2 亿美元的 Neuberger Berman 融资，以扩大股票、固定收益和加密货币领域的保证金贷款。

items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
